title: The Lost Server - The Broken Script
description: A challenging horror modpack that slowly tears apart your world and corrupt the moon as dangerous creatures watch your every move watching and waiting to corrupt your world. [LORE BASED MODPACK]
body:
DM Me IF YOU KNOW HOW TO MAKE A CUSTOM MENU (want it for the next update) dm me on curseforge and i'll reply there) **The Broken Script CAN BAN YOU FROM YOUR OWN WORLD, PRESS ESCAPE, GO INTO MODS AND FIND The Broken Script AND DISABLE WORLD BANNING IN CONFIG!** NOT AFFILIATED WITH "Lost World - The Broken Script'' BY SkyKing_PX. This modpack is not affiliated with The Broken Script or any other mod in the modpack, I do not own any mod in this modpack. For more on the original mod The Broken Script, check out its official wiki
https://thebrokenscript.wiki.gg/
Link provided for reference purposes only. This modpack is not affiliated with The Broken Script. (as in I do not own the mod) The Lost Server is a medium weight horror focused modpack centered around the mysterious and immersive mod The Broken Script (TBS) Explore a corrupted, crumbling world where you're watched, hunted, and slowly driven insane… ## This modpack introduces * Dangerous Entities * New Structures & terrifying Mobs * Over 50+ random events triggered by the TBS mod * The Moon * Memories IF YOU WANT TO CONTACT ME ABOUT SOME ISSUES ABOUT THE MODPACK OR WANT SOME FIXES MESSAGE MY CURSEFORGE AND I'LL TRY TO FIX IT! (same name in CurseForge as I have on Modrinth!) Pam’s HarvestCraft is also included, adding a wide variety of food options and farming mechanics to enrich survival gameplay. Can you manage to do what the last people couldn't? Survive and thrive in this **Lost world?**
